items.title_en: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
items.title_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门表示，随着人工智能公司寻求数十亿美元的投资，市场处于“贪婪”模式
items.desc_en: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.
items.desc_zh: 高盛首席执行官大卫·所罗门发表此番言论之际，投资者正在为多年来股票发行最繁忙的时期之一做准备。

items.title_en: Microsoft unveils new AI models to lessen reliance on OpenAI and lower costs for developers
items.title_zh: 微软推出新的人工智能模型，以减少对 OpenAI 的依赖并降低开发人员的成本
items.desc_en: At its Build developer conference, Microsoft is announcing series of generative AI models to try and crack a market controlled by OpenAI, Anthropic and Google.
items.desc_zh: 在 Build 开发者大会上，微软宣布推出一系列生成式 AI 模型，试图打入由 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Google 控制的市场。

items.title_en: Why BlackRock's Rick Rieder feels 'a bit more relaxed' about AI bull market than dotcom era
items.title_zh: 为什么贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的里克·里德 (Rick Rieder) 对人工智能牛市比互联网时代感到“更放松”
items.desc_en: 'I think you gotta stay in,' says the top BlackRock investing official, as earnings growth and cash to be reinvested in stocks support the AI bull market.
items.desc_zh: 贝莱德首席投资官员表示，“我认为你必须留下来”，因为盈利增长和再投资于股票的现金支持了人工智能牛市。

items.title_en: Jeffries: Democrats aren't focused on Trump impeachment 'at this moment'
items.title_zh: 杰弗里斯：民主党“目前”并不关注特朗普弹劾案
items.desc_en: In conversation with CNBC's Emily Wilkins, the House leader laid out Democrats' path to a majority next Congress and plans to rein in President Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 在与 CNBC 的艾米丽·威尔金斯 (Emily Wilkins) 交谈时，这位众议院领袖阐述了民主党在下届国会获得多数席位的道路，并计划限制唐纳德·特朗普 (Donald Trump) 总统。

items.title_en: Alphabet just stepped up the AI spending race. Why that could be an overhang for the hyperscaler stocks
items.title_zh: Alphabet 刚刚加快了人工智能支出竞赛。为什么这可能成为超大规模股票的悬念
items.desc_en: The Google parent's equity issuance announced Monday follows sagging free cash flows amid the infrastructure boom.
items.desc_zh: 谷歌母公司周一宣布发行股票，此前基础设施繁荣导致自由现金流下降。

items.title_zh: 美国士兵和英国士兵在伊拉克训练事故中丧生 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_en: Greg Abel channels Buffett's deal-making style in nearly $17 billion spree, expanding into tech
items.title_zh: 格雷格·阿贝尔 (Greg Abel) 效仿巴菲特的交易风格，斥资近 170 亿美元进军科技领域
items.desc_en: The back-to-back deals offer one of the clearest signals yet that Abel is prepared to put Berkshire's enormous balance sheet to work.
items.desc_zh: 这些连续交易提供了迄今为止最明确的信号之一，表明阿贝尔准备让伯克希尔庞大的资产负债表发挥作用。

items.title_en: The last time the S&P 500 rose this rapidly — outside of recession periods — was before the 1987 crash
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数上一次在经济衰退期之外快速上涨是在 1987 年崩盘之前
items.desc_en: There are some big dislocations in the stock market that are worrying investors.
items.desc_zh: 股市出现一些重大混乱，令投资者感到担忧。

items.title_en: Mysteriously missing New Jersey congressman receives Trump endorsement
items.title_zh: 神秘失踪的新泽西州国会议员获得特朗普支持
items.desc_en: Republican Congressman Tom Kean Jr has not been seen for months but is expected to win Tuesday's election.
items.desc_zh: 共和党国会议员小汤姆·基恩已经几个月没有露面，但预计将赢得周二的选举。

items.title_en: The CFTC has sparked a potential revolution on Wall Street. Exchange stocks are dropping
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会（CFTC）在华尔街引发了一场潜在的革命。交易所股票正在下跌
items.desc_en: Investors are worried about increased competition for the traditional exchanges that have long dominated on Wall Street.
items.desc_zh: 投资者担心长期主导华尔街的传统交易所的竞争加剧。

items.title_en: Rubio says U.S. is in talks with Iran over nuclear program as senators press for war endgame
items.title_zh: 卢比奥表示美国正在与伊朗就核计划进行谈判，参议员们敦促战争结束
items.desc_en: Rubio says Iran nuclear talks may advance soon as senators press Trump on war strategy, Strait of Hormuz, Cuba and Venezuela policy.
items.desc_zh: 卢比奥表示，随着参议员就战争战略、霍尔木兹海峡、古巴和委内瑞拉政策向特朗普施压，伊朗核谈判可能很快就会取得进展。

items.title_en: Iowa Democratic Senate primary could shape Democrats' path to Senate majority
items.title_zh: 爱荷华州民主党参议院初选可能会影响民主党获得参议院多数席位的道路
items.desc_en: Iowa's Senate primary between state Rep. Josh Turek and state Sen. Zach Wahls could be critical as Democrats look to take back power in Congress.
items.desc_zh: 爱荷华州众议员乔什·图雷克 (Josh Turek) 和州参议员扎克·瓦尔斯 (Zach Wahls) 之间的参议院初选可能至关重要，因为民主党希望夺回国会权力。

items.title_en: Trump signs AI executive order asking companies to give government early access to models
items.title_zh: 特朗普签署人工智能行政命令，要求公司让政府尽早访问模型
items.desc_en: AI developers, on a voluntary basis, are asked to collaborate with the government and provide early access to frontier models.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能开发人员被要求在自愿的基础上与政府合作，并提供对前沿模型的早期访问。

items.title_en: Canada formally requests renewal of North American free trade pact
items.title_zh: 加拿大正式请求续签北美自由贸易协定
items.desc_en: In a letter to his North American counterparts, US-Canada Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc said the three countries should renew the USMCA trade deal.
items.desc_zh: 美加贸易部长多米尼克·勒布朗在致北美同行的信中表示，这三个国家应续签《美加墨加协定》(USMCA) 贸易协议。

items.title_en: Trump picks housing Dir. Bill Pulte as acting intelligence chief, replacing Tulsi Gabbard
items.title_zh: 特朗普选择住房总监。比尔·普尔特（Bill Pulte）接替图尔西·加巴德（Tulsi Gabbard）出任代理情报局长
items.desc_en: Pulte has alleged wrongdoing related to mortgages against Trump's foes, Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook and New York Attorney General Letitia James.
items.desc_zh: 普尔特指控特朗普的敌人、美联储理事丽莎·库克和纽约州总检察长利蒂西亚·詹姆斯在抵押贷款方面存在不当行为。

items.title_zh: 家人称英国夫妇伊朗判刑上诉败诉
items.desc_en: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.
items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 于 2025 年 1 月在一次全球摩托车旅行中被捕。

items.title_en: South Africa police investigate killing of two Mozambican men
items.title_zh: 南非警方调查两名莫桑比克男子被杀事件
items.desc_en: The deaths come after a day of violent protests against illegal migration in the town of Mossel Bay.
items.desc_zh: 死亡事件发生前，莫塞尔湾镇发生了一天针对非法移民的暴力抗议活动。

items.title_en: Job openings in April surged to 7.6 million, the highest in nearly two years
items.title_zh: 4月份职位空缺激增至760万个，为近两年来最高
items.desc_en: The Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that available employment hit 7.6 million for the month, a surge of 731,000 from the prior month.
items.desc_zh: 美国劳工统计局报告称，本月现有就业人数达到 760 万人，比上月增加 731,000 人。

items.desc_zh: Royal Pop 系列色彩鲜艳的挂绳手表是 AP 吸引下一代收藏家的长期战略的一部分。

items.title_zh: 加纳总统表示，反 LGBTQ+ 法案将在批准前接受审查
items.desc_en: Passed by MPs, the bill proposes prison sentences for people identifying as part of the LGBTQ+ community.
items.desc_zh: 该法案经国会议员通过，提议对 LGBTQ+ 群体的人判处监禁。

items.title_zh: Instagram AI 聊天机器人被黑客欺骗以访问他人帐户
items.desc_en: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.
items.desc_zh: 一些报道将这一事件与最近高调的 Instagram 帐户被劫持的案件联系起来。

items.title_en: Denmark's Mette Frederiksen to form government after months of negotiations
items.title_zh: 丹麦梅特·弗雷德里克森经过数月谈判组建政府
items.desc_en: The leader of Denmark's Social Democratic Party is forming a centre-left coalition minority government, giving her a third term as prime minister.
items.desc_zh: 丹麦社会民主党领导人正在组建一个中左翼联合少数政府，这将让她第三次担任首相。

items.title_en: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
items.title_zh: “混乱”的人工智能推出如何伤害公司并让员工感到困惑
items.desc_en: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.
items.desc_zh: 一些公司向员工施加压力，要求其使用人工智能，但并未认真考虑人工智能的部署。

items.title_zh: Branda
items.desc_en: A fun new way to create & manage brands.
items.desc_zh: 创建和管理品牌的有趣新方式。

items.title_en: OpenAI let ChatGPT aid and abet mass shooters, Florida lawsuit claims
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州诉讼称 OpenAI 让 ChatGPT 帮助和教唆大规模枪击事件
items.desc_en: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier alleges OpenAI and boss Sam Altman built a 'web of deceit'
items.desc_zh: 佛罗里达州总检察长 James Uthmeier 指控 OpenAI 和老板 Sam Altman 构建了一个“欺骗网”

items.title_en: AI giant Anthropic announces plans to list on US stock market
items.title_zh: AI巨头Anthropic宣布计划赴美上市
items.desc_en: The AI company behind Claude is set to offer the public shares of stock sometime this year.
items.desc_zh: 克劳德背后的人工智能公司将于今年某个时候公开发行股票。

items.title_en: UK banks blocked from cyber AI tool Mythos get offer from rival OpenAI
items.title_zh: 英国银行被阻止使用网络人工智能工具 Mythos 获得竞争对手 OpenAI 的报价
items.desc_en: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.
items.desc_zh: 九家银行已获得 GPT 5.5 Cyber​​ 的访问权限，因为激烈的竞争对手 Anthropic 已阻止其工具的预览。

items.title_en: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
items.title_zh: 下一款《使命召唤》游戏的朝鲜入侵设定“有争议”
items.desc_en: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.desc_zh: 开发商 Infinity Ward 表示，这款游戏将“植根于该系列闻名的军事真实性”。

items.title_en: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
items.title_zh: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的“未来”
items.desc_en: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.
items.desc_zh: 宝马正在向欧洲的一家汽车工厂引入人形机器人，其基础是美国的类似项目。

items.title_en: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
items.title_zh: 加州总检察长因 2023 年数据泄露起诉 23andMe 继任者
items.desc_en: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
items.desc_zh: 司法部长罗布·邦塔 (Rob Bonta) 指控该公司在泄露事件的严重性方面撒了谎。

items.title_en: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
items.title_zh: Valve 将 Steam Deck 价格上调 40% 以上，原因是成本上涨
items.desc_en: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
items.desc_zh: 这家游戏巨头表示，掌上电脑没有改变，但上涨反映了“组件成本的现状”

items.title_en: King's College team wins access to cutting-edge Google quantum chip
items.title_zh: 国王学院团队获得尖端谷歌量子芯片的使用权
items.desc_en: King's College London researchers hope the chip will help answer previously unanswerable questions about the most important natural processes.
items.desc_zh: 伦敦国王学院的研究人员希望该芯片能够帮助回答有关最重要的自然过程的先前无法回答的问题。

items.title_en: Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans
items.title_zh: Meta 多次因 Facebook 和 Instagram 用户禁令而冷落欧盟机构
items.desc_en: The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.
items.desc_zh: 数百名用户联系了 BBC，声称他们被错误地禁止访问这些网站。

items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。
